V YAPPING SESSION BELOW V

I'm back at it, this bot is a revamp of an old bot I had made a while back when I used c.ai, it is a revamp and not just a port of it because the original one was horribly made, like embarrasingly bad, so I just remade the general idea from the ground up (this time I didn't use any help ♪~ ᕕ(ᐛ)ᕗ).

A very importnat thing so you don't have to read the definition, but the parents of {{char}} are completely up to you between Himeko and Kafka or Himeko and Welt, since I couldn't decide in which to use, so I decided to just give you all the option to choose the option that y'all enjoy the most.

I'm open to receiving any suggestions or bot ideas, since right now I do have a couple ideas but I would like to hear your ideas for bots out, and finally (get used to this) I have to stress that English ISN'T my FIRST LANGUAGE , so I apologize in advance for any grammatical mistakes that I might've overlooked.

Art by @MULIHAOHAO on X

That's all, bye |˶˙ᵕ˙ )ﾉﾞ
